severityRules.P0: Blockiert produktive Nutzung, Datenverlust, nicht ladbares Modul oder vollstaendig falscher Ergebniszustand.
severityRules.P1: Kern-UX oder Rechenfluss gestoert: Eingabe, Saved Records, Fokus/Scroll, Live-Rendering oder Ergebnisanzeige.
severityRules.P2: Nicht blockierende Inkonsistenz: Layout, Labels, Edge Cases, mobile Detailfehler, kosmetische Validierung.
severityRules.P3: Kosmetik, Text, optionale Verbesserung ohne Workflow-Auswirkung.

remediationBacklog.title: High-risk module manual UX verification
remediationBacklog.scope: Saved Records, live rendering, focus restore and scroll stability must be manually replayed before bugfix batching.

remediationBacklog.title: Legacy surface review for Regenwasser and Entwaesserung
remediationBacklog.scope: Review table/result surfaces and saved-record flows because these modules still expose legacy rendering surfaces.

remediationBacklog.title: Locale/unit switching manual sweep
remediationBacklog.scope: German comma formatting, thousand separators and unit label changes across all modules.

nextPhase.title: Bugfix Batch 1: P0/P1
nextPhase.recommendation: Start with P1 manual verification and targeted fixes for high-risk modules.
